hero.title: Modern Living in the Heart of Asunción

gallery.title: Spaces designed for modern urban living.

studio.title: Studio Deluxe
studio.desc: Efficient open-plan living with integrated kitchen and luxury bath. Perfect for high-yield investment.

lux2.title: Luxury 2BR Residence
lux2.desc: Two bedrooms with integrated kitchen, dining, and living area. Includes a laundry zone and full bathroom.

lux3.title: Luxury 3BR Suite
lux3.desc: Three bedrooms with a primary en-suite, open kitchen, dining and living area, laundry, and private balcony.

amenities.title: Premium Amenities
amenities.desc: Experience a curated collection of social, wellness, and leisure spaces designed to elevate everyday living.

rooftop.title: Rooftop Lounge

pool.title: Infinity Pool
pool.desc: Heated edge pool with sunset deck and private cabanas.

fitness.title: Fitness Center
fitness.desc: Private workout zone with premium equipment and yoga studio.

cowork.title: Coworking Space
cowork.desc: Quiet focus zones with high-speed connectivity and lounge pods.

security.title: 24h Security
security.desc: Concierge service, CCTV coverage, and controlled access.

parking.title: Private Parking
parking.desc: Secure underground spaces with EV charging and valet options.

location.title: Prime Location in Asunción
location.desc: Strategically positioned in the heart of the city's growth, Altos del Prado offers unmatched connectivity to the most relevant commercial and financial hubs.

item1.title: 5 min from Shopping del Sol
item1.desc: Immediate access to the country's most exclusive luxury shopping, dining, and entertainment center.

item2.title: Near Aviadores del Chaco
item2.desc: Located just moments from the main artery connecting the city to the International Airport and prime hotels.

item3.title: Close to Corporate District
item3.desc: Situated within the radius of the city's new corporate axis, home to major multinational headquarters.

invest.title: Why Invest in Altos del Prado

card1.title: Strategic Location
card1.desc: Situated in the highest demand corridor for residential and corporate rentals in Asunción.

card2.title: High Appreciation

card3.title: Premium Rental Demand
card3.desc: Perfect for corporate executives and short-stay tourism with high occupancy rates.

card4.title: Flexible Payment Plans
card4.desc: Customized financing options during the construction phase with competitive interest.
